title: Ai2 shares the architecture behind Shippy, a maritime decision-support agent
friendlyTitle: Ai2 shows how it built a careful AI helper for maritime data
summary: Ai2 explains how its Shippy maritime-awareness agent combines versioned skills, a typed API, a purpose-built command-line interface, isolated sessions and task-specific evaluations against live data. The agent is designed to show sources and limits, while avoiding legal determinations or unsupported speculation.
friendlySummary: Ai2 explains how its Shippy agent uses clear tools, private sessions and regular tests to help people study live maritime information without guessing beyond the data.
whyItMatters: The design is a useful case study in putting agents into consequential workflows: constrain the tools, isolate user data, test the complete system and make answers reviewable. Those lessons travel well beyond maritime analysis.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It offers useful ideas for building AI helpers that people can check and trust in important jobs.
